From: LlamaIndex <news@llamaindex.ai>
To: emil.skogsund@gmail.com
Date: Tue, 22 Apr 2025 13:30:00 +0000
Subject: LlamaIndex Newsletter 2025-04-22
Message-ID: <N3LGCKBNTgGgRgfnmAMyvA@geopod-ismtpd-36>
Content-Type: multipart/alternative; boundary="167f26ec1720d3d7143414795c1097aa42006f9c5d69809d8515b5e4da19"

Hi there, Llama Aficionados! 🦙

Welcome to this week's edition of the LlamaIndex newsletter!
We're thrilled to share some exciting updates, including a deep
research solution with Llama4, a new tutorial on building an
equity research agent, and a community project showcasing a
hierarchical multi-agent system.

Heads up: you can join our hands-on workshop in NYC on May 29th
to learn how to build AI solutions for financial
challenges. Apply to Attend ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..n0Khc9V9bcafh7rDV1suKcLjRgEP3hwmpnOKRit207s ).

🤩 The Highlights:

* LlamaResearcher - Deep Research with Llama4: A fully
open-source project by Clelia Bertelli that provides a complete
deep research solution. It evaluates queries, expands them into
sub-queries, searches the web, and produces essays based on the
gathered information. Page ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..8335dYXXO9DqdGol7d3KoEKVYmn9nAe-zEXhQHNhsZ4 ), Repo 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..aO3KoVDhvgA9W_o_n2ZXTmA6s8z0p4sG-6Rbzp23d7w ).

* Build an Equity Research Agent from Scratch: Our new tutorial
shows you how to create an end-to-end agentic workflow that
processes unstructured earnings reports for Tesla and Ford,
extracting and normalizing financial metrics. Notebook 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..A2doPAQZVidJ28wQ_zoS_ZeLU46QTrcVtil-icWS1SE ).

* Build a Hierarchical Multi-Agent System with LlamaIndex
Supervisor: This community project demonstrates how to
orchestrate multiple agents with a central supervisor, allowing
for flexible task delegation and multi-level agent
hierarchies. Repo ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..HR0xhv-ke4XqK3b4gqU7EjIjZeA6Kamuro0RJpp0xtY ).

🗺️ LlamaCloud & LlamaParse:

* LlamaExtract for Financial Analysis: A full-stack JavaScript
web app using LlamaExtract to perform financial analysis by
extracting risk factors from corporate annual reports. Repo 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..ugAGuZdEvjhCEJ4DyYtOlr3GZZrInysUbyOrM4M5mQg ).

* LlamaIndex Supports Gemini 2.5 Flash: Enjoy seamless
integration with the new Gemini model without any upgrades
required. Example ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..E9uz6v-JsQlHcsjcKy2qTGms4asSsy_cZ2HGi0dKuOU ).

✨ Framework:

* A2A-Compatible Agents: Learn how to build agents that
communicate securely and coordinate actions across different
technologies using the A2A protocol. Example 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..x-mNl-mumBIdx8j83i5cB7Lp3GnHdyW9pLfIma8iQZU ), Learn More ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..RBPX67I6R1bfClnPG4-dr75yxfusQqzKfWBv2jEkJ0E ) .

* Day 0 Support for GPT-4.1: OpenAI's latest model is now
supported in our API, allowing you to enhance your applications
with improved capabilities. Learn More ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..bz2mWl22Z2OwqoPS-Cswu0e9ORteG45OCeRx0UtDXBM ) .

✍️ Community:

* Catch Our Founder at the AI User Conference: Don't miss
@jerryjliu0 discussing how LlamaIndex can automate operational
work for knowledge workers. Registration 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..bc6uJExQQpAxQhXJatCVTzdDI4uFDZD7AeNAhEYAmfM ).

* Building AI Agents with LlamaIndex: Explore how to create
agents that auto-generate company risk reports and integrate with
Google Cloud databases. Talk Deck ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..ueUgF2YOX9BKFqhjlgKJHKdyX2fTczOd4xkrnt-1XbY ) , Video ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..xMfGuozRVn3xglAksi5yQK8KSnzitOTnVPLnPBgj3wc ).

Thank you for being part of our Llama community! We look forward
to bringing you more updates and innovations in the coming weeks.

* Calling all enterprises: are you building with LlamaIndex? We
are working hard to make LlamaIndex even more Enterprise-ready
and have sneak peeks at our upcoming products available for
partners. Interested? Get in touch. 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..uie0L98oPl2iOcLFr73RBhzR-XokUrsfVsrKd5cJgi4 )

* Join our Discord ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..c8sYuB7K-rCTCcLFfBjW_TZ253h_avupm7cXilVsdoI )
community for live discussions and support.

* Check out our GitHub ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..ArHLJeQ402tZSVa4IbCjjODZ9AsH0AAvzLqHmmBpR5E )  for the latest code releases and documentation.

Thank you for being a part of the LlamaIndex community. We're
here to help you unleash the power of LLMs over your data!

Best regards,
The LlamaIndex Team
